logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'CNN_Pipeline_VITIS_LOOP_71_1' (loop 'VITIS_LOOP_71_1'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('batch_normalization_8_V_load_16') on array 'batch_normalization_8_V' due to limited memory ports (II = 1). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'batch_normalization_8_V'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html
